overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing the character Geralt walking through a rural village with traditional log cabins and thatched roofs. The journey transitions from open farmland along fenced paths, through a shaded birch forest section, and into a village center with chickens and decorative red banners.

scene_state.functional_zone: rural farmland path with wooden fencing

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along a dirt path beside a wooden fence, with farmland and haystacks visible in the distance

entered.detail: rustic wooden post fence running alongside the dirt path
muddy dirt trail with visible wagon ruts and footprints
low stone wall behind the wooden fence
conical haystacks in the field beyond the fence
traditional log cabin with thatched roof in the village distance
tall evergreen trees forming the forest edge
wooden archway structure with hanging red decorative banners

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a sunlit dirt path bordered by a wooden fence and stone wall. Open farmland stretches to the left with haystacks, while traditional log cabins and a banner arch mark the village ahead.

events.description: path enters wooded area with birch trees and dense undergrowth
sunlight becomes dappled and diffused as canopy cover increases

agents.ego_description: Geralt continuing along the path as it winds through a birch forest with dense vegetation on both sides

entered.detail: white-barked birch trees with green foliage creating partial canopy
dense green undergrowth and shrubs lining the path

segments.scene_description: The path enters a shaded birch forest where dappled sunlight filters through the canopy. Dense bushes line the trail as the village banner arch becomes visible through the trees ahead.

events.description: exiting the wooded area into open grassland with scattered birch trees

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through tall grass and scattered birch trees, approaching log cabin structures on the village outskirts

entered.detail: tall green grass covering the ground in the open area

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the forest into sunlit grassland, Geralt approaches the village outskirts. A log cabin draws near on the left while the red banner arch stands prominently ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: village center with log cabins and decorative banners

events.description: chickens appear scattered on the path ahead

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking through the village center, passing log cabins and navigating around chickens scattered on the dirt path

notable_agents.action: white chickens pecking at the ground and wandering across the dirt path

entered.detail: wooden wagon or cart parked near the log cabin

segments.scene_description: Walking through the village center, Geralt passes traditional log cabins with stone foundations. Chickens wander the dirt path while wooden carts and red decorative banners mark the village square.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from an open, sunlit countryside through a shaded woodland and into the heart of a rustic village. It begins with Geralt walking along a dirt path bordered by a wooden fence and stone walls, with open farmland and distant log cabins visible under a bright sky. As the path narrows, the scene shifts into a shaded birch forest where dappled sunlight filters through the canopy and dense bushes line the trail. The camera then emerges from the trees back into sunlit grassland, approaching the village outskirts and a prominent red banner arch. Finally, the movement leads into the village center, passing traditional log cabins with stone foundations and wandering chickens amidst wooden carts and decorative banners.
